# EVERLIGHT VENTURES SITE ARCHITECTURE V2
# everlightventures.io | Lovable Build Plan
# Generated by Hive Deep Dive -- 2026-03-06
#
# This replaces the original LOVABLE_SITE_MASTER.md structure.
# Based on full workspace inventory of ACTUAL built assets.

---

## WHAT CHANGED FROM V1

V1 was marketing copy for products that mostly didn't exist yet.
V2 is built around what you ACTUALLY HAVE -- and you have a LOT more
than the original site assumed:

- 5 complete children's books with illustrations, audiobooks, EPUBs, HTML readers
- A full adult novel manuscript with audiobook
- Playable HTML5 game prototypes (Alley Kingz v8 with 3D)
- A working POS system with real sales data
- A live trading bot with exportable metrics
- Brand assets (SVG logos, color system, typography)

The site should SHOW and SELL, not just describe.

---

## SITE MAP (10 pages, up from 7)

```
/                       Homepage (venture hub + portfolio)
/publishing             Publishing hub (all books)
/publishing/sam-and-robo    Sam & Robo series (5 books, samples, buy)
/publishing/beyond-the-veil Beyond the Veil (sample chapters, audiobook preview, waitlist)
/alley-kingz            Alley Kingz (PLAYABLE DEMO + game info)
/onyx                   Onyx POS (product page + free trial)
/hivemind               Hive Mind (waitlist + built-in-public proof)
/him-loadout            HIM Loadout (affiliate gear drops)
/logistics              Everlight Logistics (quote form)
/dashboard              XLM Bot investor dashboard (public metrics)
```

PAGE 3: SAM & ROBO SERIES (/publishing/sam-and-robo)
======================================================================

PURPOSE: This is your BOOKSTORE. Sell books. Give samples. Play audiobook previews.

THIS IS A BIG DEAL -- You have 5 COMPLETE books with:
- Full manuscripts
- 12 paired illustrations each (color + B/W coloring pages)
- Complete audiobooks (MP3s)
- EPUB files
- HTML interactive readers
- KDP-ready DOCX files

SECTIONS:
1. Series Hero:
   - Sam & Robo character art (EXISTS: Sam_and_Robo.jpg)
   - "Every word is a door. And every door is an adventure."
   - Age range: 3-8 | Phonics-based | Interactive coloring hybrid

2. BOOK GRID (5 books):
   Each book card shows:
   - Cover art (EXISTS for all 5)
   - Title + superpower theme
   - Sample illustration (one color page from each book)
   - [Read Sample] -> opens HTML reader (EXISTS for all 5)
   - [Listen to Sample] -> plays book*_sample.mp3 (EXISTS for all 5)
   - [Buy on Amazon] -> KDP link (set up when published)
   - [Download Coloring Page] -> one free B/W illustration per book

   Book 1: Sam's First Superpower (Emotional Intelligence)
   Book 2: Sam's Second Superpower (Science & Curiosity)
   Book 3: Sam's Third Superpower (Problem Solving)
   Book 4: Sam's Fourth Superpower (Environmental Awareness)
   Book 5: Sam's Fifth Superpower (Teamwork)

3. INTERACTIVE PREVIEW:
   - Embed the HTML reader for Book 1 (Sams_First_Superpower_reader.html)
   - Scrollable chapter preview with illustrations inline
   - "Read the first 3 pages free"

4. AUDIOBOOK PLAYER:
   - Embedded audio player for audiobook/trailer_sample.mp3 (ElevenLabs Hollywood voice)
   - Label: "Sample audio book"

5. COLORING PAGE DOWNLOAD:
   - Grid of B/W illustrations from all 5 books
   - Free download as lead magnet (email capture)
   - "Download 5 Free Coloring Pages -- one from each adventure"

6. FOR PARENTS & TEACHERS:
   - Phonics progression explanation
   - Science of Reading alignment
   - Educator guide download

ASSETS (ALL EXIST):
- Covers: Book1/1_cover.jpg ... Book5/5_cover.jpg
- Ebook covers: 1_cover_ebook.jpg ... 5_cover_ebook.jpg
- Illustrations: 60+ paired color/BW JPGs across all 5 books
- HTML readers: Sams_*_Superpower_reader.html (all 5)
- Audio samples: audiobook/trailer_sample.mp3 (ElevenLabs Hollywood voice, one per book)
- Full audiobooks: book*_complete.mp3 (all 5)
- EPUBs: *.epub (all 5)
- Character art: Pictures_Firepower/ folder

SOURCE PATHS:

PAGE 5: ALLEY KINGZ (/alley-kingz)
======================================================================

PURPOSE: PLAYABLE GAME PAGE. Not "coming soon" -- play it NOW.

YOU HAVE:
- game_v8.html: 4,261 lines, Three.js 3D, 41 characters, full gameplay loop
- Multiple earlier versions (v4-v7) as fallbacks
- Complete game design docs (README, Art Bible, Prompt Bible)
- 7 synergy systems, 10 city factions, spell system
- Advance Contract monetization design

SECTIONS:
1. Hero -- "Rule the Alley. Own the Arena." (keep V1 copy)
2. PLAY NOW (EMBEDDED GAME):
   - iframe or embed of game_v8.html directly in the page
   - Full-screen toggle button
   - Mobile responsive (canvas-based, should work)
   - "Alpha Demo -- Help us build the future of street gaming"
3. THE ROSTER:
   - Grid showing faction breakdown (41 cards across 10 cities)
   - Compton, Detroit, Chicago, Brooklyn, Atlanta, Oakland, Miami,
     Las Vegas, Neo Tokyo, Kingz Court
   - Card type breakdown: 30 troops, 8 spells, 3 buildings
4. GAME MECHANICS (condensed from V1):
   - Real-time PvP, 8-card decks, elixir economy
   - Advance Contract system explained
   - Synergies: Speed Demon, Street Gang, Heavy Metal, Spell Cycle,
     Ghost Rider, Fire Starter, Dark Carnival
5. THE ART VISION:
   - Art Bible excerpts with visual direction
   - "Hyper-real urban power -- Clash Royale meets Uncharted 4"
6. EARLY ACCESS:
   - Email capture for mobile app waitlist
   - "Web demo live now. Mobile coming 2026."

EMBED APPROACH:
  Option A: iframe pointing to game_v8.html hosted on same domain
  Option B: Upload game_v8.html to Lovable public folder, link directly
  Option C: Host on GitHub Pages from EverlightVentures repo, iframe in

  Recommended: Option A -- upload game_v8.html as a static asset in the
  Lovable project, embed via iframe with lazy loading

ASSETS (ALL EXIST):
- Playable game: prototype/game_v8.html (also v4, v5, v6, v7)
- Deployable: prototype/index.html, index_v2.html
- Game design: ArenaAdvance/README.md

PAGE 10: XLM BOT DASHBOARD (/dashboard) -- NEW PAGE
======================================================================

PURPOSE: Public-facing investor/customer performance dashboard.

YOU HAVE:
- Live bot on Oracle Cloud exporting metrics.json
- Streamlit dashboard (localhost:8502) with full telemetry
- Daily trade reports (markdown)
- export_metrics.py running on cron
- Data: win rate, PnL, equity curve, trade count, expectancy

SECTIONS:
1. Hero: "Live Algorithmic Trading -- XLM Perpetuals"
2. PERFORMANCE CARDS (pull from metrics.json):
   - Today's PnL
   - Win Rate (all time)
   - Total Trades
   - Current Position (long/short/flat)
   - Bot Uptime / Last Heartbeat
3. EQUITY CURVE:
   - Chart.js line chart of cumulative PnL over time
   - Pull from dashboard_timeseries.jsonl (or pre-processed export)
4. RECENT TRADES TABLE:
   - Last 10 trades with entry/exit price, PnL, duration
   - Pull from trades.csv export
5. STRATEGY OVERVIEW:
   - "AI-advised entries using Claude Opus as executive decision engine"
   - Confluence scoring, multi-indicator stack
   - Risk management: margin policy, drawer system
6. DISCLAIMER:
   - "Past performance does not guarantee future results"
   - "This is a live system -- results update in real time"

IMPLEMENTATION:
  Option A: Static page that fetches metrics.json from an API endpoint
  Option B: Embed a simplified Streamlit dashboard via iframe
  Option C: Build a Chart.js dashboard in Lovable pulling from Supabase
            (export_metrics.py pushes to Supabase instead of local file)

  Recommended: Option C -- export_metrics.py on Oracle pushes to Supabase
  every 5 min. Lovable page reads from Supabase. Real-time, no iframe.

SOURCE PATHS:
  /06_DEVELOPMENT/xlm_bot/data/metrics.json
  /06_DEVELOPMENT/xlm_bot/dashboard.py
  /09_DASHBOARD/reports/

---

## PRIORITY ORDER FOR BUILDING

### PHASE 1 -- "Ship What's Done" (Week 1)
1. /publishing/sam-and-robo -- You have 5 COMPLETE books. Sell them.
   - Upload covers, embed HTML readers, audio samples
   - Amazon KDP links when ready
   - Coloring page lead magnet
2. /alley-kingz -- Embed game_v8.html. Playable immediately.
3. /publishing/beyond-the-veil -- Sample chapter + audiobook preview
4. / -- Homepage with real stats and live badges

### PHASE 2 -- "Connect the Money" (Week 2)
5. /onyx -- Screenshots + Stripe trial signup
6. /dashboard -- XLM bot metrics via Supabase
7. /publishing -- Hub page linking to sub-pages

### PHASE 3 -- "Fill the Gaps" (Week 3)
8. /hivemind -- Waitlist + built-in-public proof
9. /him-loadout -- When affiliate links are ready
10. /logistics -- Quote form via Supabase

## TECHNICAL IMPLEMENTATION NOTES

### Lovable + Supabase Integration
- All forms (waitlist, quote requests, email capture) -> Supabase tables
- Book purchases -> Amazon KDP links (external)
- Onyx trial -> Stripe Checkout -> Supabase customer record
- Bot metrics -> Supabase (pushed from Oracle VM) -> Lovable reads

### Static Asset Hosting
- Upload all JPGs, MP3 samples, SVGs to Lovable public assets
- HTML game files: host as static pages in same Lovable project
- Full audiobooks: DO NOT host publicly (paid content)
- EPUBs: behind email gate or Amazon link

### GitHub Sync
- Repo: EverlightVentures/everlightventures.git (connected)
- All Lovable changes sync to GitHub automatically
- Can also push code changes via GitHub -> Lovable picks them up

### DNS (everlightventures.io)
- Namecheap -> Lovable (A record + TXT verification)
- Follow steps in LOVABLE_SITE_MASTER.md DNS SETUP section
